meta.notes: Core exercise library for LLM training plan generation. LLM selects from this list — does not invent exercises. Max 5 exercises per session.

SkiErg.name: Cable Straight-Arm Pulldown
SkiErg.description: Arms straight, pull bar from overhead to hips

Sled Push.name: Sprint Sled Push
Sled Push.description: 6 x 20m at 50–60% race weight, maximum speed

Sled Push.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
Sled Push.description: Rear foot elevated, front leg does the work

Sled Push.name: Box Jump
Sled Push.description: Explosive two-foot jump onto box, step down

Sled Pull.name: Heavy Sled Pull
Sled Pull.description: 4–6 x 12.5m hand-over-hand rope pull at race weight or above

Sled Pull.name: Conventional Deadlift
Sled Pull.description: Barbell deadlift from floor, full hip extension

Sled Pull.name: Single-Arm Bent-Over Row
Sled Pull.description: Unilateral row with dumbbell, chest supported or freestanding

Sled Pull.name: Seated Cable Row
Sled Pull.description: Heavy bilateral cable row, full retraction at finish

Sled Pull.name: Dead Hang
Sled Pull.description: Max-duration hang from pull-up bar, passive grip

Burpee Broad Jump.name: Burpee Broad Jump
Burpee Broad Jump.description: Race-standard sets of 20–30 reps: chest to floor, explosive forward jump

Burpee Broad Jump.name: Box Jump
Burpee Broad Jump.description: Explosive two-foot jump onto box, maximum height

Burpee Broad Jump.name: Broad Jump
Burpee Broad Jump.description: Standing horizontal jump for maximum distance, 5 x 5 reps

Burpee Broad Jump.name: High-Volume Push-Up
Burpee Broad Jump.description: 4 x 20+ reps, full range of motion, chest to floor

Burpee Broad Jump.name: Jump Squat
Burpee Broad Jump.description: Squat to parallel, explode upward, land softly

Rowing.name: Rowing Steady-State
Rowing.description: 3–5 x 1000m at controlled pace, 2 min rest between efforts

Rowing.name: Rowing Intervals
Rowing.description: 5 x 500m at race pace or above, 1 min rest between efforts

Rowing.name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
Rowing.description: Barbell row, hinge at hip, pull to lower chest

Rowing.name: Romanian Deadlift
Rowing.description: Hip hinge with soft knee, bar stays close to legs

Farmers Carry.name: Heavy Farmers Carry
Farmers Carry.description: 5 x 40m at or above race weight, controlled pace

Farmers Carry.name: Single-Arm Farmers Carry
Farmers Carry.description: 4 x 20m each side, resist lateral lean

Farmers Carry.name: Suitcase Carry
Farmers Carry.description: 4 x 20m each side, weight held to one side like a suitcase

Farmers Carry.name: Pinch Grip Plate Hold
Farmers Carry.description: 3 x max duration, hold weight plate between fingers and thumb

Farmers Carry.name: Barbell Shrug
Farmers Carry.description: Heavy shrug, 4 x 10, full elevation and brief hold

Sandbag Lunges.name: Sandbag Walking Lunge
Sandbag Lunges.description: Race-standard sets of 20–30m with race-weight sandbag on shoulders

Sandbag Lunges.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
Sandbag Lunges.description: 4 x 8–10 each leg, rear foot elevated, deep range of motion

Sandbag Lunges.name: Front Rack Walking Lunge
Sandbag Lunges.description: 4 x 20m with barbell or kettlebells in front rack position

Sandbag Lunges.name: Reverse Lunge
Sandbag Lunges.description: 4 x 12 each leg, step backward into lunge

Sandbag Lunges.name: Hip Flexor Mobility — Couch Stretch
Sandbag Lunges.description: Daily mobility work, 3 x 60s each side

Wall Balls.name: Wall Ball
Wall Balls.description: Race-standard sets of 20–30 unbroken reps, break parallel on each squat

Wall Balls.name: High-Volume Wall Ball
Wall Balls.description: 50–100 rep time trial, simulate race conditions

Wall Balls.name: Dumbbell Thruster
Wall Balls.description: 4 x 12, full squat into overhead press in one movement

Wall Balls.name: Front Squat
Wall Balls.description: 4 x 6–8, barbell in front rack, below parallel

Wall Balls.name: Push Press
Wall Balls.description: 4 x 8, leg drive into overhead press

running.name: Zone 2 Long Run
running.description: Sustained easy effort at 75–80% max heart rate

running.name: Tempo Run
running.description: Comfortably hard, sustained effort at ~85% max heart rate

running.name: 1km Interval Repeats
running.description: Repeated 1km efforts at 90–95% effort with full recovery between

running.name: 800m Interval Repeats
running.description: Repeated 800m efforts at high intensity with full recovery between

running.name: 500m Interval Repeats
running.description: Repeated 500m efforts at near-maximum intensity with full recovery between

running.name: Compromised Run
running.description: Station workout immediately followed by a 1km run, repeated for 4–6 rounds. Simulates race fatigue.

running.name: Hill Repeats
running.description: Hard uphill efforts on a hill or treadmill incline (6–8%), walk/jog recovery back to start

general.name: Conventional Deadlift
general.description: Barbell deadlift from floor, full hip extension at top

general.name: Kettlebell Swing
general.description: Hip-hinge driven swing to shoulder height, explosive hip extension

general.name: Goblet Squat
general.description: Squat holding kettlebell at chest, below parallel

general.name: Core Circuit
general.description: 3 rounds: Plank 60s + Dead Bug 10 reps each side + Pallof Press 10 reps each side
